name: Banana Almond Torte
recipeIngredient: 7 Large eggs, separated and kept at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the yolks with an electric mixer until thick and pale.
2. Gradually add the sugar, beating until the mixture is very thick.
3. Beat in the lemon juice and grated orange rind, then add the mashed bananas, matzah cake meal, almonds, and salt. Mix until well combined.
4. In a clean dry bowl, beat the egg whites with a clean dry beater until they just hold stiff peaks. Stir 1 cup of the whites into the banana mixture.
5. Gently fold in the remaining egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into an ungreased 9-inch (3 1/2-inch deep) tube pan with a removable bottom.
7. Bake in the center of a preheated 350°F oven for 55-60 minutes, or until a tester inserted comes out clean.
8. Invert the pan over the neck of a bottle and let cool upside down.
9. Run a thin knife around the edge and tube of the pan, remove the removable bottom, and release the torte.
10. Transfer the torte carefully with 2 spatulas to a serving plate.
I hope you enjoy this as much as I have.
Sandi in CT
